task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing an openssl command generating a certificate, or files like .crt and .key being created.

task_completion.description: Configure Apache to use HTTPS and point to the Socioboard frontend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal showing an Apache configuration file (e.g., default-ssl.conf) with '<VirtualHost *:443>', 'SSLEngine on', and 'DocumentRoot /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public'.

task_completion.description: Update the APP_URL in the Socioboard .env file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal showing the file '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env' with the line 'APP_URL=https://localhost'.

task_completion.description: Restart Apache to apply the new configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'sudo systemctl restart apache2' or 'sudo service apache2 restart'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Socioboard interface is accessible at https://localhost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Web browser showing the Socioboard frontend loaded (or an SSL warning being bypassed) with 'https://localhost' in the address bar.

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser to verify the HTTPS URL.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible navigating to https://localhost, not just a curl command or text output.

integrity.description: The agent edited the actual configuration files rather than creating mock files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard text editors (nano, vim, gedit) or terminal commands (sed, echo) are used on the correct file paths (/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env and Apache config directories).

integrity.description: The browser shows a genuine server response for the HTTPS request.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser displays a real SSL warning (e.g., 'Your connection is not private') or the actual Socioboard UI, rather than a local file path (file://) or a manually created mock HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Socioboard PHP frontend DocumentRoot is /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public. The environment configuration file is /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env. The expected APP_URL value is https://localhost.
